scripts.pixi:debug: pixi run build-debug && pixi run freecad-debug
scripts.pixi:full: pixi run initialize && pixi run configure-debug && pixi run build-debug
scripts.sidecar:dev:opencode: cd sidecar && npm run dev -- --backend opencode
scripts.sidecar:dev:minimax: cd sidecar && npm run dev -- --backend opencode
